experiment_7.Task: Run a Galaxy metagenomics gene-catalog pipeline with assembly and annotation on paired-end reads.
experiment_7.Prompt: I have paired-end metagenomic reads and want a Galaxy workflow that assembles contigs, predicts genes, performs functional and taxonomic annotation, and quantifies abundance across samples. Please choose an appropriate Galaxy metagenomics gene-catalog pipeline, run it, and report the functional annotation tool, the assembly tool, and the total number of tool steps in the workflow you actually ran.
